title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents 5 production deployment best practices for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered auth (API Gateway, Cognito, WAF, IAM), type-safe database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost controls via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The patterns are demonstrated using Strands Agents SDK on AWS.
